case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE ANTONIO PALMA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE ANTONIO PALMA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, JOSE ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, JOSE ANTONIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, JOSE ANTONIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, JOSE ANTONIO
